-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

GIVE YOURSELF THE GIFT OF ENRICHMENT

50% OFF FOR 26 WEEKS. 

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/110c98faclayfousuan2uwpqaaaaaazy52vsqsniqkyyaaaaa 

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear Times Reader,

The New York Times is the most engaging way to stay
informed and inspired. 

This holiday season, give yourself a gift that will stimulate 
your every day – a Times Digital Subscription for 50% off
for 26 weeks.

Get more informed, inspired and challenged with unlimited
access to nytimes.com and our apps for smartphones or
tablets or both. 

Have the world’s finest journalism at your fingertips anytime, 
anywhere. Act now to take advantage of this special, 
limited-time offer: 50% off for 26 weeks.

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS SPECIAL, LIMITED-TIME OFFER

http://email.newyorktimes.com/1f3ddbbf8layfousuan2uwpyaaaaaazy52vsqsniqkyyaaaaa

50% OFF FOR 26 WEEKS

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/13b6271b6layfousuan2uwqaaaaaaazy52vsqsniqkyyaaaaa 

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered 
user of The New York Times. 

This sale expires on December 30, 2013, 9 a.m. E.T. 

Promotional offers valid for new subscriptions only. New York 
Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader 
editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords 
apps. Smartphone and tablet apps are not supported on
all devices. 

Digital subscriptions will automatically renew and the credit 
card will be charged in advance of each 4-week billing period 
unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and 
termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. 
Other restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please 
add nytimes@email.newyorktimes.com to your address book.

50% Off for 26 Weeks         


Dear Times Reader,

The New York Times is the most engaging way to stay informed and inspired.

This holiday season, give yourself a gift that will stimulate your every day — a Times Digital Subscription for 50% off for 26 weeks.

Get more informed, inspired and challenged with unlimited access to nytimes.com and our apps for smartphones or tablets or both.

Have the world’s finest journalism at your fingertips anytime, anywhere. Act now to take advantage of this special, limited-time offer: 50% off for 26 weeks.

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS SPECIAL, LIMITED-TIME OFFER.
You received this e-mail because you are a registered user of The New York Times.

This sale expires on December 30, 2013, 9 a.m. E.T.

Promotional offers valid for new subscriptions only. New York Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Smartphone and tablet apps are not supported on all devices.

Digital subscriptions will automatically renew and the credit card will be charged in advance of each 4-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please add nytimes@email.newyorktimes.com to your address book.
